name.note: PIPELINE BLOCKER: All web research places The Pine Golf & Lodge in Bangkok (Krathum Ra, northern suburbs, ~1 hour from central Bangkok), NOT in Chiang Mai. The pipeline task notes 'Mae Rim / Mae Sa valley area' but no Pine Golf course was found in that location. This entry cannot be completed without clarification from the pipeline owner. All fields remain null.

prose.overview: PIPELINE BLOCKER — NOT COMPLETABLE WITHOUT CLARIFICATION. This entry was submitted to the pipeline as 'The Pine Golf & Lodge, Mae Rim / Mae Sa valley area, Chiang Mai'. However, all web research conducted across multiple search passes consistently places 'The Pine Golf & Lodge' (website: thepinegolf.com) in the northern suburbs of Bangkok (Krathum Ra district, approximately 1 hour north of central Bangkok). No Pine Golf course, lodge, or resort was found in the Mae Rim, Mae Sa, or wider Chiang Mai area. The pipeline owner should verify: (1) whether this is a data entry error, (2) whether a different Chiang Mai course was intended, or (3) whether a Pine Golf property genuinely exists in Chiang Mai under a variant name not captured in search results. Until this is clarified, this entry carries a full blocker and no prose can be written.
prose.rental_cta_context: Not completable — course location cannot be confirmed in Chiang Mai.
